mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task_assignments WHERE minute_id = #{minuteId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM task_assignments WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM task_assignments ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_assignments (id, minute_id, assignee_id, task_content, deadline, status, priority, completed_time, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{minuteId}, #{assigneeId}, #{taskContent}, #{deadline}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{completedTime}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE task_assignments SET assignee_id = NULL WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId}
